title: Wrong boardname in Chrome tab
excerpt:
Using Chrome as browser the tabname is always set to the displayed board. However when I configure a recipe sentence where the user selects a board in the configuration, the tabname changes to the selected board. 
See th…

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using Chrome as browser the tabname is always set to the displayed board. However when I configure a recipe sentence where the user selects a board in the configuration, the tabname changes to the selected board.

See this small video: https://www.loom.com/share/44318d89c0ba47d9b7a6115b7f5c29d6 and have a close look to the tabname when configuring the recipe

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @basdebruin!

Wow, what a good catch! It never crossed my mind to even look for something like this, you have a keen eye.

I just tested this further with our native integrations and automations, and I was surprised to find the same behavior occurs there. I’ll log that to our development team as something that should be adjusted platform-wide. I really appreciate you flagging this for us!

-Alex
